examples: In this paper, a natural hair dye is studied, which mainly contains organic compound of plant without toxic lead and phenylamine sensitizer.
OBJECTIVE To synthesize and select novel derivatives of salicylaldehyde-phenylamine Schiff base with high insecticidal activity against the Fascila hepatica.
The effective phenylamine degrading strain is applied to high-concentration phenylamine waste water treatment or phenylamine pollution incident emergency treatment.
